title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.070 - Appointment in case of death or removal of referee
text:
515.070.  Appointment in case of death or removal of referee. — In case of the death or removal from the state of a referee, another shall, if necessary and proper, be appointed to fill the vacancy.
(RSMo 1939 § 1146) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 980; 1919 § 1430; 1909 § 2000
